title: Cannot borrow as mutable because also borrowed as immutable
explanation: This error occurs when you try to take a mutable reference to a value while an immutable reference to it still exists. Rust enforces that you can have either one mutable reference OR any number of immutable references, but not both at the same time.
error_message: error[E0502]: cannot borrow `v` as mutable because it is also borrowed as immutable

fixes.description: Use the immutable reference before mutating

tip: This rule prevents data races at compile time. If push() reallocates the vector, the reference to the first element would be invalidated.
